summon fenris.desccalca1: (par6 * lvl) + skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.lvl)* skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.par6)
summon fenris.dsc2calca1: skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.lvl)* skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.par2)

summon grizzly.dsc2calca2: skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.lvl) * skill('Summon Spirit Wolf'.par2)

death sentry.desccalca1: skill('mon death sentry'.par3) + skill('mon death sentry'.par4) * (lvl - 1)
